---
name: code-coverage
description:
  Analyzes the codebase to determine the extent of code coverage by tests.
---

# Code Coverage Skill
This skill evaluates the codebase to determine the percentage of code covered by automated tests. It identifies untested areas and provides insights to improve test coverage.

## Features
- Calculates overall code coverage percentage.
- Identifies files and functions with low or no test coverage.
- Suggests areas for additional testing.

## Output format
- A detailed report showing:
  - Overall code coverage percentage.
  - Coverage breakdown by file and function.
  - Recommendations for improving coverage.

## Usage
Invoke this skill to:
- Assess the quality of test coverage in the codebase.
- Identify critical areas lacking tests.
- Plan improvements to the testing strategy.
